[{"Id": "a05Wt000003SukEIAS", "OpportunityId__c": "None", "LeadId__c": "00QWt0000089AekMAE", "Body__c": "[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!", "CreatedDate": "2023-10-21T10:02:00.000+0000", "EndTime__c": "2023-10-21"}]

args.query: SELECT Id, OpportunityId__c, LeadId__c, Body__c, CreatedDate, EndTime__c FROM VoiceCallTranscript__c WHERE LeadId__c = '00QWt0000089AekMAE';

[{"id": "ka0Wt000000EqQ9IAK", "title": "Understanding TechPulse's Return Policy for Purchased Items", "faq_answer__c": "TechPulse Solutions is committed to ensuring customer satisfaction with a clear, customer-focused return policy for its purchased items. This policy outlines the processes for returns, refunds, and exchanges, ensuring a seamless experience for all customers while reinforcing TechPulse’s dedication to transparency and quality.

Firstly, TechPulse acknowledges that sometimes products might not meet customer expectations or specific needs. To address this, the company offers a straightforward return process. Customers can initiate a return request within 30 days from the date of purchase. It’s essential that the products are returned in their original condition, with all components, manuals, and accessories included. This ensures that the items can either be resold or appropriately processed.

To initiate a return, customers can easily access their accounts on the TechPulse website or contact the customer support team directly. The process is designed to be user-friendly, reflecting TechPulse's emphasis on a seamless customer experience. After initiating a return, customers will receive a prepaid shipping label to make the return process as convenient as possible.

Upon receiving and inspecting the returned items, TechPulse aims to process refunds swiftly. Typically, refunds are issued within 7-10 business days to the original payment method, ensuring a prompt resolution. In certain situations, TechPulse might offer store credit or exchanges as alternatives, based on customer preferences and the specifics of the transaction.

TechPulse also understands that customers may sometimes require exchanges instead of refunds. Whether due to product malfunction or a desire for a different item, exchanges are handled with utmost efficiency. Customers are encouraged to contact customer support to discuss their needs and identify solutions that best match their requirements, further solidifying TechPulse’s commitment to delivering personalized service.

Furthermore, for products demonstrating manufacturing defects, TechPulse has a robust system in place for resolution. The company commits to replacing or repairing defective products at no additional cost to the customer, showcasing their commitment to quality and reliability.

Beyond procedural details, TechPulse’s return policy underscores the importance of transparency and open communication. By providing clear guidelines and exceptional support during the return process, TechPulse strives to build trust and foster long-lasting customer relationships. This policy not only reflects TechPulse’s focus on customer satisfaction but also its broader strategic objective of fostering collaborative relationships that ensure mutual success in the rapidly evolving technological marketplace.

For additional support or clarification regarding the return policy, TechPulse encourages customers to reach out directly. Their dedicated customer service team is always ready to assist, ensuring every customer interaction aligns with the company’s high standards for excellence and care.", "summary": "Details of TechPulse Solutions' return policy for purchased items, outlining the process for returns, refunds, and exchanges to ensure transparency and customer satisfaction.", "urlname": "1745269013-p6yto"}, {"id": "#ka0Wt000000EpSUIA0", "title": "TechPulse Solution Volume-Based Installation Timeline Policy", "faq_answer__c": "TechPulse Solution Volume-Based Installation Timeline Policy

At TechPulse Solution, we understand that time is of the essence when deploying new technologies, which is why we have crafted a clear and efficient volume-based installation timeline policy. This policy ensures that our installation and setup services align with your purchase volume, providing a structured approach that is both predictable and reliable for your business needs.

To cater to varying scales of purchase and to maintain a streamlined installation process, we have implemented specific timelines based on the quantity of units purchased. Below, you will find the detailed schedule outlining the installation timelines according to different purchase volumes:

1. **Single Unit Purchase (Volume: 1)**  
   For customers purchasing a single unit, we offer rapid installation services, completing the process within a single day. This timeline guarantees that even small-scale acquisitions receive prompt attention and quick operational readiness.

2. **Small Batch Purchase (Volume: 5)**  
   When purchasing a slightly larger batch of 5 units, our installation timeline extends to 3 days. This duration allows our team to efficiently manage and deploy the necessary resources and services to ensure each unit is correctly installed and fully operational.

3. **Medium Batch Purchase (Volume: 15)**  
   For medium batch purchases involving 15 units, our installation timeline is planned at 7 days. This one-week period is carefully designed to accommodate the increased complexity and coordination required to handle a higher volume of installations while maintaining exceptional service standards.

4. **Large Batch Purchase (Volume: 25)**  
   In cases where our clients opt for a large batch of 25 units, the installation timeline extends to 14 days. This two-week window allows our team to meticulously address all logistical, technical, and quality assurance aspects associated with larger deployments, ensuring seamless integration into your existing infrastructure.

By adhering to these predefined timelines, TechPulse Solution aims to provide transparent expectations and optimal customer service. Our commitment to delivering excellence, regardless of the size of the purchase, ensures that each client receives the comprehensive support they deserve, enhancing the overall technology deployment experience.

It is important to note that all timelines are subject to the availability of inventory and resources at the time of purchase. We recommend coordinating with your account manager to discuss any specific requirements that may necessitate timeline adjustments, allowing us to tailor our installations to your company’s unique operational schedule.

Should you have any questions or require further details about our installation processes, please do not hesitate to contact us. TechPulse Solution remains dedicated to supporting your technological advancements with precision and efficiency, ensuring your investments bring maximum value to your organization.", "summary": "TechPulse Solution Volume-Based Installation Timeline Policy", "urlname": "1745269013-n1rg3"}, {"id": "ka0Wt000000Em4zIAC", "title": "Navigating Installation Challenges: Solutions for Seamless Setup of TechPulse EDA Tools", "faq_answer__c": "Navigating the installation of TechPulse Solutions' electronic design automation (EDA) tools can present challenges for users, particularly when encountering software installation errors. These hurdles can significantly impede the initial setup of TechPulse’s powerful tools. However, TechPulse is committed to providing solutions that ensure a smooth and efficient installation process, aligning with its dedication to balancing innovation with cost-effectiveness and superior support services.

To tackle the common issues faced during installation, TechPulse offers the 'Priority Support Upgrade'. This solution is designed to provide an enhanced level of service by granting users access to faster response times. This means reduced delays when installation errors occur, ensuring that users can swiftly overcome challenges with minimal disruption. With a 'Priority Support Upgrade', users benefit from a dedicated support team ready to address and resolve installation issues efficiently. Notably, this upgrade is available for a duration of 365 days post-purchase, allowing users ample time to resolve any initial setup issues that may arise.

In addition to the support upgrade, TechPulse Solutions provides 'Comprehensive Training Access', which plays a pivotal role in empowering users. Through a detailed suite of training modules, users can gain a deep understanding of all product features, equipping them with the knowledge needed to navigate potential installation roadblocks confidently. This approach not only enhances their understanding of the EDA tools but also builds the necessary skills to prevent or swiftly address installation issues independently. Unlike the 'Priority Support Upgrade', the training access is not limited by time constraints, allowing users to take advantage of this resource whenever they wish to refine their skills or revisit certain modules.

Together, these solutions enhance the installation experience by addressing both immediate and long-term needs of the users. Through the combined powers of targeted support and comprehensive education, TechPulse ensures that its customers enjoy a seamless integration of their AI-powered EDA solutions, maximizing the utility and return on investment of their purchases. As TechPulse Solutions continues to innovate and support its users with robust data protection and seamless integration capabilities, these initiatives solidify its standing as a leader in the electronic design automation industry, ensuring clients’ readiness for emerging technological advancements.", "summary": "TechPulse Solutions clients sometimes face software installation errors, which can be an obstacle during the initial setup of the company's powerful electronic design automation tools. args.query: SELECT id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname FROM knowledge__kav WHERE title ILIKE '%PulseSim%' OR title ILIKE '%installation%' OR title ILIKE '%budget%' OR title ILIKE '%approval%' OR title ILIKE '%finance%' OR title ILIKE '%purchase%' LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname FROM knowledge__kav WHERE title ILIKE '%PulseSim%' OR title ILIKE '%installation%' OR title ILIKE '%budget%' OR title ILIKE '%approval%' OR title ILIKE '%finance%' OR title ILIKE '%purchase%' LIMIT 20;

args.code:
import json
import re
import os

# Access the transcript result stored in var_call_BfYB0zRaSFkoEgVY8Y9EvLPO
transcripts = var_call_BfYB0zRaSFkoEgVY8Y9EvLPO
transcript_text = " ".join([t.get("Body__c", "") for t in transcripts])
transcript_text_lower = transcript_text.lower()

# Load knowledge articles result (may be a file path)
kas = []
ka_var = var_call_VN8o3bdMeMii3IZGfFdYiegv
if isinstance(ka_var, str) and os.path.exists(ka_var):
    with open(ka_var, 'r') as f:
        kas = json.load(f)
elif isinstance(ka_var, list):
    kas = ka_var
else:
    # try to load if it's a JSON string
    try:
        kas = json.loads(ka_var)
    except Exception:
        kas = []

# Initialize BANT flags
budget_ok = False
authority_ok = True
need_ok = False
timeline_ok = False

# Analyze transcript for budget
# Look for explicit budget and pricing info
budget_matches = re.findall(r'\$[\d,]+', transcript_text)
nums = [int(m.replace('$','').replace(',','')) for m in budget_matches]
if nums:
    # He mentioned budget $2,261 and unit price $500 in the transcript
    # If there's a budget number and a unit price that fits the requested quantity, consider budget OK
    if len(nums) >= 2:
        # assume largest is budget, one of the others is unit price
        budget = max(nums)
        unit_price = min(nums)
        # check quantity mentioned
        qty_match = re.search(r'([0-9]+) units', transcript_text_lower)
        qty = int(qty_match.group(1)) if qty_match else None
        if qty and unit_price * qty <= budget:
            budget_ok = True
    else:
        # presence of price/budget mention — assume OK
        budget_ok = True

# Analyze authority: look for consult/finance/approval phrases
if any(kw in transcript_text_lower for kw in ["consult", "finance team", "need to consult", "don't have the final say", "do not have the final say", "i don\'t have the final say", "need approval", "not the final decision"]):
    authority_ok = False

# Analyze need: look for interest and stated need
if any(kw in transcript_text_lower for kw in ["interested", "want to", "we want", "need", "enhance our", "fits with what we need", "fit with what we need"]):
    need_ok = True

# Analyze timeline: look for timeline mention and vendor's ability to meet it
if "timeline" in transcript_text_lower or "installation" in transcript_text_lower:
    # if vendor explicitly states they can meet tight timelines, consider timeline OK
    if "complete installations within a day" in transcript_text_lower or "complete installations within a day" in transcript_text:
        timeline_ok = True
    else:
        # check knowledge articles about installation timelines for potential conflicts
        kb_timeline_conflict = False
        for k in kas:
            body = (k.get('faq_answer__c') or '').lower()
            title = (k.get('title') or '').lower()
            if 'volume-based installation timeline' in title or 'volume-based installation timeline' in body or 'installation timeline' in title or 'installation timeline' in body:
                # if policy lists that 5 units take 3 days, a request for 4 units may not be guaranteed within 1 day
                if 'small batch purchase' in body and '3 days' in body:
                    # transcript requested 4 units (less than 5) and vendor claimed 1 day; assume acceptable
                    kb_timeline_conflict = False
        timeline_ok = not kb_timeline_conflict

# Compile failed factors
failed = []
if not budget_ok:
    failed.append("Budget")
if not authority_ok:
    failed.append("Authority")
if not need_ok:
    failed.append("Need")
if not timeline_ok:
    failed.append("Timeline")

# Default: if nothing failed, return empty list

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(failed))

[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!
